flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Baptist University of Florida fell 51% between 2021 and 2024 (91.7% → 45.0%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Baptist University of Florida rose 23% between 2021 and 2024 ($12.2k → $15.0k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Baptist University of Florida rose 23% between 2021 and 2024 ($12.2k → $15.0k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Baptist University of Florida fell 15% between 2021 and 2024 (31.6% → 26.9%).
